reviews.comment:
Buena atención. Lugar adecuado para hacer un alto en el camino. Exquisito  sandwich de jamón.

(Translated by Google)
Good service. A good place to stop off. Delicious ham sandwich.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXb29iZnpnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Atencion rapida. Cafe + -. Baños mejorables

(Translated by Google)
Quick service. Coffee is okay. Bathrooms could be improved.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXZ3JDRTNRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Siempre encantada con lo q el paisaje de Los Altares me regala. Y parada obligada en la YPF a buscar los exquisitos de crudo en pan casero. Una pena, está vez la desagradable atención en el full.

(Translated by Google)
Always enchanted by what the Los Altares landscape offers me. And a must-stop at YPF to pick up the delicious raw meats on homemade bread. It's a shame the unpleasant service at the counter this time.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXck1ETVlnEAE

reviews.comment:
Podés abonar tus combustible con la ap YPF autoservicio solo efectivo, al pasar por allí no olvides llevar efectivo y poder comprarte los famosos sandwich de lomitos y pan casero, muy buenos.

(Translated by Google)
You can pay for your fuel with the YPF self-service app (cash only). When you go there, don't forget to bring cash so you can buy their famous steak sandwiches and homemade bread—they're delicious!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXek52aENBEAE

reviews.comment:
LOS ALTARES que bello lugar!!! Toda las montañas a la orilla de la ruta son dignas de admirar x sus colores, formas; la mayoría de mis fotos son de aca.

(Translated by Google)
Los Altares, what a beautiful place!!! All the mountains along the road are worthy of admiration for their colors and shapes; most of my photos are from here.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXNklDZldnEAE

reviews.comment:
el titulo de ACA le queda grande a esta estación ,tenían 1 playero para 35 autos esperando cargar combustible ,una vergüenza el abuso del patronal !!!
para colmo el playero me comento que estaba laburando solo , porque su compañero contrajo covid y el obviamente igual estaba contagiado por contacto estrecho ,pero como no tenia síntomas los patrones lo obligaban a ir atrabajar de todas formas ,una verguenza .

(Translated by Google)
The "ACA" title is a huge misnomer for this station. They had one attendant for 35 cars waiting to fill up—the employer's abuse of power is shameful!
To top it all off, the attendant told me he was working alone because his coworker had contracted COVID, and he was obviously also infected through close contact. But since he had no symptoms, the owners forced him to come to work anyway. It's a disgrace.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXa0t1Um93RRAB

reviews.comment:
Probar el sandwich de crudo y manteca! Parese seco al principio pero esta sarpadooo!!

(Translated by Google)
Try the ham and butter sandwich! It seems dry at first, but it's amazing!!
